message:
🌱 Mobile UI polish: tour, dropdowns, FAB positions, card layout (#383)

- Disable tour on mobile devices to prevent UI conflicts
- Fix hourglass "updating" layout shift by reserving fixed width
- Move FAB "+" button to bottom-left on mobile (smaller size)
- Move AI Missions button to bottom-right on mobile
- Make navbar overflow menu a bottom sheet on mobile
- Make alerts dropdown a bottom sheet on mobile
- Fix ClusterHealth card text overlap on mobile (stack vertically)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
